nasb.text: “You have heard that the ancients were told, ‘You shall not commit murder’ and ‘Whoever commits murder shall be     liable to the court.’

esv.text: “You have heard that it was said to those of old,     ‘You shall not murder; and whoever murders will be liable     to judgment.’

cnv.text: “你們聽過有這樣吩咐古人的話：‘不可殺人，殺人的必被判罪。’

ccb.text: “你们听过吩咐古人的话，‘不可杀人，杀人的要受审判。’

csbs.text: “你们听过那吩咐古人的话：‘不可杀人。    杀人的，当遭受审判。’
